rule.statement: Roles swap every 15-30 minutes; swap logged.
rule.rationale: Without a swap, one engineer becomes a passive observer.

rule.statement: One style is named before the session: driver-navigator OR ping-pong OR strong-style OR tour-guide.
rule.rationale: Unnamed style defaults to whoever talks loudest.

rule.statement: Both participants edit through a single shared cursor / Live Share / Tuple stream; never two separate IDEs editing the same file.
rule.rationale: Separate IDEs create merge conflicts mid-session and fracture shared context.

rule.statement: If an agent is in the session, it speaks only when explicitly addressed. No proactive suggestions.
rule.rationale: Proactive agent suggestions cause humans to defer thinking; the agent becomes the dominant voice.

rule.statement: At session end, a 5-min retro captures: what worked, what to change, one metric.
rule.rationale: Without retro, the same dysfunction repeats next session.
